data.body: AC amendment: The git stash rollback test must test BOTH: (a) rollback of file modifications (existing tracked file changed by failed recipe) AND (b) rollback of file creation (new untracked file created by failed generative recipe). Standard 'git stash push' does not include untracked files — use 'git stash push --include-untracked' or explicit deletion of created files on failure. Add test: test_git_stash_rollback_file_creation — set up a git fixture, trigger a fake failure that creates a new file, verify the new file is deleted on rollback. Verify: grep -q 'untracked\|file_creation\|new_file' tests/scripts/test-rope-adapter.sh
